articles.title: Like ‘driving to San Francisco and back, every week’: In rural America, cancer patients face tall hurdles to get care - cnn.com
articles.description: As cancer care becomes both more advanced and more specialized, options in rural areas have shrunk.
articles.content:
EDITORS NOTE:  This story was reported in collaboration with the Global Health Reporting Center with support from the Pulitzer Center.
Andy Henard is used to doing things for himself. Thats the way … [+13909 chars]
